tools.name: registry.registryCreateApi
tools.description: CreateApi creates a specified API.

tools.name: registry.registryCreateApiDeployment
tools.description: CreateApiDeployment creates a specified deployment.

tools.name: registry.registryCreateApiSpec
tools.description: CreateApiSpec creates a specified spec.

tools.name: registry.registryCreateApiVersion
tools.description: CreateApiVersion creates a specified version.

tools.name: registry.registryCreateArtifact
tools.description: CreateArtifact creates a specified artifact.

tools.name: registry.registryDeleteApi
tools.description:
DeleteApi removes a specified API and all of the resources that it
 owns.

tools.name: registry.registryDeleteApiDeployment
tools.description:
DeleteApiDeployment removes a specified deployment, all revisions, and all
 child resources (e.g. artifacts).

tools.name: registry.registryDeleteApiDeploymentRevision
tools.description: DeleteApiDeploymentRevision deletes a revision of a deployment.

tools.name: registry.registryDeleteApiSpec
tools.description:
DeleteApiSpec removes a specified spec, all revisions, and all child
 resources (e.g. artifacts).

tools.name: registry.registryDeleteApiSpecRevision
tools.description: DeleteApiSpecRevision deletes a revision of a spec.

tools.name: registry.registryDeleteApiVersion
tools.description:
DeleteApiVersion removes a specified version and all of the resources that
 it owns.

tools.name: registry.registryDeleteArtifact
tools.description: DeleteArtifact removes a specified artifact.

tools.name: registry.registryGetApi
tools.description: GetApi returns a specified API.

tools.name: registry.registryGetApiDeployment
tools.description: GetApiDeployment returns a specified deployment.

tools.name: registry.registryGetApiSpec
tools.description: GetApiSpec returns a specified spec.

tools.name: registry.registryGetApiSpecContents
tools.description:
GetApiSpecContents returns the contents of a specified spec.
 If specs are stored with GZip compression, the default behavior
 is to return the spec uncompressed (the mime_type response field
 indicates the exact format returned).

tools.name: registry.registryGetApiVersion
tools.description: GetApiVersion returns a specified version.

tools.name: registry.registryGetArtifact
tools.description: GetArtifact returns a specified artifact.

tools.name: registry.registryGetArtifactContents
tools.description:
GetArtifactContents returns the contents of a specified artifact.
 If artifacts are stored with GZip compression, the default behavior
 is to return the artifact uncompressed (the mime_type response field
 indicates the exact format returned).

tools.name: registry.registryListApiDeploymentRevisions
tools.description:
ListApiDeploymentRevisions lists all revisions of a deployment.
 Revisions are returned in descending order of revision creation time.

tools.name: registry.registryListApiDeployments
tools.description: ListApiDeployments returns matching deployments.

tools.name: registry.registryListApis
tools.description: ListApis returns matching APIs.

tools.name: registry.registryListApiSpecRevisions
tools.description:
ListApiSpecRevisions lists all revisions of a spec.
 Revisions are returned in descending order of revision creation time.

tools.name: registry.registryListApiSpecs
tools.description: ListApiSpecs returns matching specs.

tools.name: registry.registryListApiVersions
tools.description: ListApiVersions returns matching versions.

tools.name: registry.registryListArtifacts
tools.description: ListArtifacts returns matching artifacts.

tools.name: registry.registryReplaceArtifact
tools.description: ReplaceArtifact can be used to replace a specified artifact.

tools.name: registry.registryRollbackApiDeployment
tools.description:
RollbackApiDeployment sets the current revision to a specified prior
 revision. Note that this creates a new revision with a new revision ID.

tools.name: registry.registryRollbackApiSpec
tools.description:
RollbackApiSpec sets the current revision to a specified prior revision.
 Note that this creates a new revision with a new revision ID.

tools.name: registry.registryTagApiDeploymentRevision
tools.description:
TagApiDeploymentRevision adds a tag to a specified revision of a
 deployment.

tools.name: registry.registryTagApiSpecRevision
tools.description: TagApiSpecRevision adds a tag to a specified revision of a spec.

tools.name: registry.registryUpdateApi
tools.description: UpdateApi can be used to modify a specified API.

tools.name: registry.registryUpdateApiDeployment
tools.description: UpdateApiDeployment can be used to modify a specified deployment.

tools.name: registry.registryUpdateApiSpec
tools.description: UpdateApiSpec can be used to modify a specified spec.

tools.name: registry.registryUpdateApiVersion
tools.description: UpdateApiVersion can be used to modify a specified version.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
